key_findings: Anomaly types that transfer poorly: local_outlier, cluster_boundary. These may require specialized handling during distillation.
Best transferring knowledge: isolation (82.7% retention). Worst: local_structure (68.1% retention).
High anomaly collapse rate (31.1%). Student frequently misses anomalies the teacher detected.
